title: UIRefined
description: UIRefined improves and refines the UI of Minecraft!
body:
UIRefined is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack focused on enhancing and modernizing the game's user interface without altering its core gameplay. Designed for players who value clarity, functionality, and aesthetics, UIRefined brings a cleaner, more intuitive experience to your HUD, menus, inventory, and more.

Whether you're managing your inventory, exploring maps, checking stats, or navigating settings, UIRefined ensures every interface feels smooth, stylish, and user-friendly — all while staying true to the original Minecraft vibe. Ideal for builders, adventurers, and casual players alike.
